nodes.name: White-eyed starling
nodes.summary: The white-eyed starling (Aplonis brunneicapillus) is a species of starling in the family Sturnidae. It is found in the Solomon Islands archipelago. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical swamps. It is threatened by habitat loss. References External links BirdLife Species Factsheet

nodes.name: Aplonis
nodes.summary: Aplonis（Aplonis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联20种鸟类，如Metallic starling、Yellow-eyed starling、Rennell starling等20种鸟类。
